params.name: Stray Birds
params.description: Stray Birds is the work of a famous poet named Tagore. It has 325 short poems, mostly themed on weeds, falling leaves, birds, stars, and other common things in life. It conveys the author's spiritual pursuit, praises the freedom and equality of all lives, and presents the sacrifice in life and the meaning of life. These short but philosophical poems became Tagore's most important works that made a profound impact.
